reference: I have had documented herniated discs and bulging discs shown by MRI in my neck. I have had two MRIs, and the second one showed some worsening in my neck. The surgeon did not want to perform surgery just for pain, and I agree. Lately, I have experienced increased pain in my neck and left shoulder, along with an electrical current-like feeling running down my neck, which seems slightly to the left. I cannot find a comfortable position. Muscle relaxants and two Aleve tablets do not help.
text: I have had documented herniated discs and folging discs shown by MRI in my neck. I have had two MRIs, and the second one showed some worsening in my neck. The surgeon did not want to perform surgery just for pain, and I agree. Lately, I have experienced increased pain in my neck and left shoulder, along with an electrical current I feel in running down my neck, which seems slightly to the left. I cannot find that comfortable position. Muscle relaxants and two elated tablets do not help.
